title: Water Crews Continue Repairs to Water Main Break on Shonnard Street
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is conducting repairs on a water main break located on the 100 block of Shonnard Street. Service disruptions are expected in the area, with Shonnard Street between West Street and Niagara Street closed to vehicle traffic during repairs. Sidewalks remain accessible and traffic detours are in place.

entity_refs.name: City of Syracuse Department of Water

processing_notes: Author field marked Unknown in source
Contact number provided: (315) 448-8360 for Department of Water
